name: NSACryptEvents
summary: NSACryptEvents collector retrieves Windows events log information from Microsoft-Windows-Audit-CVE provider.

fields.name: process_id
fields.description: ID given by operating system to the process.

fields.name: thread_id
fields.description: The thread ID spawned by the process.

fields.name: time_created
fields.description: Time when the event was created.

fields.name: message
fields.description: CVE associated with the vulnerability for which this event is created.

examples.title: Example: Show hostnames that reported a CVE exploitation attempt through Microsoft-Windows-Audit-CVE.
examples.v2_query: HostInfo hostname and NSACryptEvents where NSACryptEvents id not equals ""
